_riso_tech: orchestrator-split message envelope contract; consumed by validate-message.mjs and the dispatch-agent/intake-task/report-task skills
_task_turn: task: kebab slug ([a-z0-9-]) assigned by the orchestrator at first dispatch, stable across every turn of the same task; turn: positive int, one per dispatch pair. Files live at .superpowers/<task>/turn-<turn>-request.json and turn-<turn>-response.json

optional.blocked_ops: array of {op, reason} — operations the worker's environment denied; orchestrator routes each per dispatch-agent Step 8
